title: Protein production of SLC63A2
author: Vera Pütter
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol is used to purify SLC63A2 expressed in insect cells using detergent solubilization followed by Flag affinity purification and size exclusion chromatography.
steps_raw: This protocol is used to purify SLC63A2 expressed in insect cells using detergent solubilization followed by Flag affinity purification and size exclusion chromatography.
